message:
test(core): add property-based tests for QoE guardrail lane (ft-2p9cb.6.5.3)

12 proptests: QoEMetric/SLO/SLOVerdict/Degradation serde, record increments,
window eviction, SLO met/breached for latency, smoothness polarity,
compliance_rate bounded, reset clears, record_batch equivalence.
Fixed f64 JSON precision in QoESLO serde test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
